name: Pickles
story: Pickles spent her first months as a garden regular, charming an entire block for snacks before a neighbour called us. She still patrols windowsills like they're hedgerows.
She narrates her day in cheerful chirps and ends it on the nearest warm lap. A home with a sunny window — or a safe balcony — would make her whole year.

medical.notes: Fully vaccinated and spayed. One healed ear nick from her outdoor days — purely decorative.

photoAlt: Pickles, an orange tabby, standing tall in a green garden
